content.en:
After breaking through to the Invincible Ancestor, Ye Tian's perception broke through the shackles of the Dark Forbidden Domain, and he was even able to barely sense the area outside the Dark Forbidden Domain.

"That's ......"

Ye Tian sensed the aura of the origin, but it was an ownerless origin, and it was also an extremely chaotic origin.

At this time, Ye Tian obviously found that he was able to tear through the void of the Dark Forbidden Domain and go to the area outside the Dark Forbidden Domain.

It's an instinct.

And when the physical body is the strongest in the realm, no matter how strong his strength is, he doesn't have this feeling.

This is the ability that belongs only to the invincible.

Immediately, Ye Tian's invincible ancestor clone tore through the Dark Forbidden Domain and stepped into the area outside the Dark Forbidden Domain.

Wow!

When Ye Tian stepped into the ocean of the origin of chaos, he immediately realized what kind of place this was.

Genhai!

The source sea is the origin of everything, the exotic world is born from the source sea, and annihilated from the source sea, except for the invincible and the creatures above, other creatures can not survive in the source sea, and they cannot come to the source sea.

The source sea rejects all living beings above the invincible, even if it is the strongest, with the help of the invincible, it is impossible to travel through the exotic world to reach the source sea, and it is directly rejected.

Ye Tian stood in the source sea, although he could survive here, his strength was suppressed very much, as if he had instantly turned into an ordinary creature, unable to exert too powerful attack power.

Of course, the same is true for other living beings.

Ye Tian instinctively wanted to absorb the origin in the source sea, but found that he couldn't absorb it, the origin here was not only chaotic, but also like a whole, and the invincible people couldn't absorb the origin of the source sea at all.

It was at this time that Ye Tian sensed it carefully, and he actually sensed a call, which was a call from the eternal heaven and earth.

"It's too far!"

Ye Tian shook his head.

If he hurried from the Source Sea, his current speed was too slow, and the Eternal Heaven and Earth were too far away from here, and I was afraid that it would take a long time to reach the Eternal Heaven and Earth.

Therefore, when the strength is relatively low, it is not a wise choice to rush in the source sea.

Moreover, the source sea is not necessarily free of danger, and he does not dare to cross the source sea.

However, with a vague sense of the location of the Eternal Heaven and Earth, he could tear through the void from one Exotic Heaven and Earth to the Source Sea to find a route.

Basically, the location of an Exotic Heaven and Earth in the Source Sea is not too far away, so it can be done by taking some time to find a route.

When the time comes, you can travel through exotic worlds and finally reach the eternal world.

Moreover, the invincible does not need to use the second-order gate, only needs to know the coordinates of the opponent's exotic world, and he can tear out a temporary door to reach the opponent's exotic world.

For example, if the invincible people of the six super-name-level forces want to enter the Dark Forbidden Realm, they don't need to use the door to directly tear apart the barriers of the two exotic worlds, so as to cross the exotic world and reach the other party's exotic world, but it will consume some strength.

After becoming an invincible ancestor, Ye Tian retreated for a period of time and stabilized the realm of the invincible ancestor.

Subsequently, he began to refine many resources to improve his cultivation, but found that the effect was too slow.

It was as if those resources were of no use to him all of a sudden.

After thinking about it carefully, Ye Tian figured it out.

The Invincible Ancestor had almost surpassed the realm of an Exotic Heaven and Earth itself, so the resources born of the Exotic Heaven and Earth itself were too ineffective for him.

Now, the resources that are really of great help to him are of little use except for robbing stones and blood.

If he was able to enter the eternal world, the many resources there should still be of great help to him.

"The robbery stones in my hands are gone, and if I want to greatly improve my cultivation, just tens of thousands of robbery stones are definitely far from enough, and the first robbery blood should not help me much, unless it is the robbery blood on the body of the second tribulation beast, or the robbery blood of the more powerful robbery beast, it can greatly improve my cultivation!"

Ye Tian muttered.

The robbery stones were too difficult to find, unless he could endure the long years and wait for the exotic world to face the catastrophe in the past, and the heaven and earth would be destroyed, he could collect enough robbery stones.

Other invincibles may be able to wait, but his cultivation speed is too fast, and now the cultivation time is far less than a fraction of that of other invincibles, so he doesn't have so much patience to wait.

Therefore, he currently has only one way, that is, to hunt the robber beasts, obtain the robber blood on the beasts, and use them to improve his cultivation, and even these robberies can help the human race give birth to some of the strongest people in the flesh robbing realm.

It is difficult for the strongest to find the robber, but it is not difficult for the invincible to find the beast.

this day.

Ye Tian condensed an invincible ancestor to copy the body, tore through the barrier between the dark forbidden domain and the Yuan Demon Heaven and Earth, and descended to the Yuan Demon Heaven and Earth, just because the Yuan Demon Heaven and Earth were in the period of the Great Tribulation, so if the copy body came here, the strength would not be suppressed.

Next, Ye Tian's thoughts turned into thought clones and went to all parts of the Yuan Demon Heaven and Earth to find the location of the beast.

After Ye Tian arrived at the Invincible Ancestor, the scope of his exploration and his mastery of the Void far surpassed that of the supreme powerhouse, so he had a ninety percent hope that he would be able to find the hiding location of the robbery beast before the end of the catastrophe.

Time passes slowly.

Finally, Ye Tian found the sleeping place of the tribulation beast when the Yuan Demon Heaven and Earth Tribulation was about to pass.

Subsequently, Ye Tian's copy body descended here, tearing apart the space-time node with one blow and discovering the beast.

Bang!!!

The robber beast was disturbed from its sleep, woke up, and looked at Ye Tian angrily.

Then, the raider struck.

The strength of the robbery beast is more recognizable, and the robbery beast only has one robbery pattern on its body, but now this robbery beast has 1795 robbery patterns, which means that this robbery beast is 1,795 robbery beasts.

This means that the Yuan Demon Heaven and Earth have been destroyed at least 1,795 times before, so a tribulation beast of 1,795 tribulations will be born.

Ye Tian didn't know how powerful the Tribulation Beast of the 1,795 Tribulations was, but he soon knew.

Seeing that this beast was staring at Ye Tian, Ye Tian couldn't move.

Then, the beast grabbed it with one claw.

Bang!

Ye Tian's replica body was killed in seconds without any resistance.

Dark Forbidden Realm.

Ye Tian's body sensed the fall of the copy body, and couldn't help but be shocked: "The tribulation beast of the Yuan Demon Heaven and Earth is so powerful!!

He now finally understood why the invincible beings of the six super-famous forces didn't go hunting the beasts themselves, because the beasts were too terrifying.

This is still a tribulation beast that has only survived more than a thousand eons, if it is a tribulation beast that has survived 100,000 eons, how terrifying would it be?
